description: Controlled change to re-image Sam Osborne's Dell laptop after the boot failure. Scope is limited to the single device; data backed up first; rollback is restore from image. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Re-image Dell laptop after boot failure

description: Controlled change to replace the display cable in Sam Osborne's Tahoe mobile data terminal to resolve screen flicker. Scope limited to the one MDT; rollback is reinstall original cable. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Replace Tahoe MDT display cable

description: Controlled change to replace the battery in Sam Osborne's Dell laptop. Scope limited to the single device; rollback is reinstall original battery. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Laptop battery replacement

description: Controlled change to install and configure the VPN client on Sam Osborne's Dell laptop for remote access. Scope limited to one device; rollback is uninstall client. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Install VPN client on laptop

description: Controlled change to update the printer driver on Sam Osborne's laptop to fix garbled output. Scope limited to one device; rollback is roll back to prior driver. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Update printer driver

description: Controlled change to reset Sam Osborne's account password and re-enable the locked account. Scope limited to one account; rollback is re-lock if anomalous. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Account password reset

description: Controlled change to grant Sam Osborne read access to the shared drive folder. Scope limited to one account's permissions; rollback is revoke access. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Grant shared drive read access

description: Controlled change to swap the docking station at Sam Osborne's desk to resolve external monitor detection. Scope limited to one dock; rollback is reinstall original. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Replace desk docking station

description: Controlled change to rebuild Sam Osborne's Outlook mail profile to stop repeated password prompts. Scope limited to one device; rollback is restore prior profile. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Rebuild Outlook mail profile

description: Controlled change to re-secure the MDT mount bracket in Sam Osborne's Tahoe. Scope limited to one vehicle mount; rollback is reinstall original bracket. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Re-secure Tahoe MDT mount

description: Controlled change to clean the cooling vents and reapply thermal paste on Sam Osborne's laptop to fix overheating. Scope limited to one device; rollback is none required. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Laptop thermal service for overheating

description: Controlled change to replace the keyboard on Sam Osborne's Dell laptop due to sticking keys. Scope limited to one device; rollback is reinstall original keyboard. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Replace laptop keyboard

description: Controlled change to reconfigure Sam Osborne's laptop Wi-Fi network profile to fix authentication failures. Scope limited to one device; rollback is restore prior profile. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Reconfigure laptop Wi-Fi profile

description: Controlled change to power-cycle and recommission the Tahoe MDT that won't power on. Scope limited to one terminal; rollback is swap to spare unit. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Recommission Tahoe MDT power fault

description: Controlled change to enroll Sam Osborne's laptop in the standard patch and update schedule. Scope limited to one device; rollback is unenroll. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Enroll laptop in patch schedule

description: Controlled change to install a replacement office printer and map it to Sam Osborne's laptop. Scope limited to one device mapping; rollback is remove printer. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Install replacement office printer

description: Controlled change to migrate Sam Osborne's laptop mailbox to the new mail server. Scope limited to one account; rollback is revert to prior server. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Migrate mailbox to new mail server

description: Controlled change to set up multi-factor authentication on Sam Osborne's account. Scope limited to one account; rollback is disable MFA. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Enable MFA on account

description: Controlled change to replace the worn power adapter for Sam Osborne's Dell laptop. Scope limited to one accessory; rollback is reuse original adapter. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Replace laptop power adapter

description: Controlled change to upgrade RAM in Sam Osborne's Dell laptop to improve performance. Scope limited to one device; rollback is reinstall original modules. Requested by Sam Osborne.
short_description: Change request — Laptop RAM upgrade
